use_cases: Composing and sending messages in AI chat interfaces
Attaching files and media to chat conversations
Expanding and collapsing chat input areas
Displaying loading states during message submission
Managing conversation states with status indicators
ai_summary: A Claude-style chat input component with bundled premium icons from lucide-react for building AI conversational interfaces. Supports message composition, file attachments, expandable input areas, and various conversation states including loading and completion indicators. Designed for modern SaaS and developer tool applications requiring clean, minimal chat interfaces.
